toc_title: SQL Server HADR vs Azure Hybrid Benefit
title: SQL Server HADR and centrally managed Azure Hybrid Benefit coexistence - Microsoft Cost Management
display_title: Use SQL HADR with centrally managed Azure Hybrid Benefit
description: This article explains how the SQL Server HADR Software Assurance benefit and centrally managed Azure Hybrid Benefit coexist.
summary: One of the benefits of Software Assurance (SA) is that it allows Azure customers to install and run passive SQL Server instances for disaster recovery in anticipation of a failover event. Scope-level management of Azure Hybrid Benefit supports the SQL Server HADR benefit by ensuring that the qualified disaster recovery replicas don't consume assigned SQL Server licenses. As a result, you don't have to manage the replicas separately.
classification_reason: Explains coexistence rules between SQL HADR SA benefit and centrally managed Hybrid Benefit, including which replicas consume licenses—this is nuanced, product-specific usage guidance.
